notes: Bug is Windows-specific (DirectWrite glyph-to-unicode race condition). Tested on macOS arm64 which uses CoreText backend — not reproduced after 4 runs with 3.119.1 and 4 runs with 3.119.2, both with 50+ parallel tasks. Reporter confirmed Linux (FreeType) is also unaffected. Requires Windows to reproduce the DirectWrite threading issue.

reproductionSteps.description: Create console repro project with SkiaSharp 3.119.1
reproductionSteps.command: mkdir -p /tmp/skiasharp/repro/3437 && cd /tmp/skiasharp/repro/3437 && dotnet new console -n Repro --framework net10.0 && cd Repro && dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 3.119.1

filesCreated.description: Reporter's reproduction code: creates SKSvgCanvas in parallel Task.Run calls, draws text elements, checks SVG output for blank text elements via regex
Console project targeting net10.0 with SkiaSharp 3.119.1 NuGet package

reproductionSteps.description: Run repro with SkiaSharp 3.119.1 on macOS arm64 (4 runs with 50+ parallel tasks each)
reproductionSteps.output: All 4 runs completed with 0 bug occurrences. Synchronous (5 tasks), parallel (20 tasks), and heavy parallel (50 tasks) all passed. RESULT: BUG NOT REPRODUCED. macOS uses CoreText, not DirectWrite.

reproductionSteps.description: Test with latest SkiaSharp 3.119.2 on macOS arm64 (4 runs)
reproductionSteps.output: All 4 runs: RESULT: BUG NOT REPRODUCED (0 bug occurrences each run with 50+ parallel tasks). Bug is Windows-specific.

versionResults.notes: Not reproduced on macOS arm64 (CoreText backend). 4 runs with up to 50 parallel tasks each. Bug is Windows-specific (DirectWrite).
Not reproduced on macOS arm64 (CoreText backend). 4 runs with up to 50 parallel tasks each.

blockers: Requires Windows — current environment is macOS arm64 (CoreText backend). DirectWrite is only available on Windows.
Docker cannot run Windows containers on macOS — cannot emulate the DirectWrite font backend

corrections.upstream: Triage predicted reproduced on any platform
corrections.corrected: Bug is Windows-only as reporter stated. macOS (CoreText) is unaffected, Linux (FreeType) confirmed unaffected by reporter. Only DirectWrite on Windows triggers the race condition.
